What's up, gym lords? Let's talk about how you can get the most out of going through the portal, how you can speed up videos and be able to consume content that much faster. So what you're going to do is you're going to type into Google Chrome, video speed controller. It is a Chrome extension. Once you're there, you're simply going to click on it. It's going to take you to the Chrome Web Store. Once you're here, you're going to simply click Add to Chrome. Then this extension, this little pop-up will happen. You're going to add extension and it will pop up right there. Now let's talk about how this actually works now. You can use it. What you're going to want to do is you're going to want to go ahead and log out and then log back in. But once you're there, you're going to notice this little button right up here on the video. So after you log back in, this little section, all right. Once you're here, I'm going to go ahead and shut down the sound on this, but once you play, this will pop up. You'll be able to increase the speed at which you watch it and be able to consume the content that much faster. So you'll see this pop up. You're going to want to make sure that you log out of the portal and log back in, but this will automatically be built into all of the videos that you now watch inside the portal.
